name: Naegami — Calling in Sick.
description:
-^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^_^-

These two are married! — They love each other...Like. LOVE each other, Even though Byakuya is a little....You know...”Focused on money” type shit. No....Not for me...Yes Byakuya is still stern, overly blunt and rude...He does have a little tiny spot JUST for Naegi...If you don’t like this ship...Well....That’s just to damn bad❤️...
